note: Created ReturnCodeHandlingAndLastErrorTests.cs with 49 tests covering: all native error codes map to correct exception types via ThrowIfError, mapped range codes (-1xx through -5xx) produce correct subclasses, wg_last_error retrieval (most recent, UTF-8, long strings), no-prior-error fallback to "Unknown native error", and thread-safety (concurrent ThrowIfError calls, concurrent LastError reads, concurrent different error codes).
